strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure domains
Demonstrated AI-agent infrastructure work and open-source AI/ML tooling (e.g., MCP code generators)
Proven entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, an open-source AI-enabled geospatial platform used by NGOs
concerns: No explicit evidence of cloud platform strategy leadership or AI product ownership at scale
Resume name (Aisha Okonkwo) mismatched with contact/GitHub/LinkedIn handles (szabobogdan), raising red flag for authenticity
Lack of documented AI/ML model development, training, or deployment experience beyond infrastructure tooling
response.justification: The candidate has 15+ years of engineering experience, including direct AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq and an open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with AI-relevant data workflows, fulfilling the core requirement of AI product fluency. However, the persistent mismatch between the named candidate (Aisha Okonkwo) and all digital identities (szabobogdan) casts serious doubt on resume authenticity, undermining trust in all claims. While the technical depth is strong, the identity discrepancy is a critical red flag that cannot be ignored.
